Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Koro-chan was in top form for that fight! Maybe he's giving it his all because he just met back up with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}And I can sense he has some affection for you, Sister... Hmph.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30007 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 2 25 25}Tell me, Sister, which one of us is more helpful to you? And be honest! Please![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 2 25 25}Oh, don't give me that look. It's like you're saying, "Fine, you can have this win." You're a dog![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30028 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 3 25 25}I was afraid you'd say that... I suppose that means I'll have to apply myself more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 0 25 25}I... I wasn't expecting that. Honestly, I thought you'd choose one of your friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 0 25 25}You say some profound things... for a dog.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}It seems like everything's going pretty well! I hope we can keep up the momentum as we progress...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}I admit I was worried about our battle prowess... But we managed to dispatch such a strong foe without much difficulty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}{f 4 23 1 9 0 25 25}You did great, Koromaru. As for me, I've some catching up to do—since you all got a head start reacclimating yourselves.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}But with everyone helping Aigis, I was able to focus on my investigation. You have my appreciation for that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}I know I'm rather late, but... I hope you'll still have me at your side as we face whatever comes next.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Hehe... There may not be much I can do to help, but I promise you I'll do the best I can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}I'm sure we all feel the same way. That's precisely why we're here together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4028 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Hm... That may be so. Allow me to rephrase myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}Let us fight together—to better our odds of escaping this place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Surely, you can get behind that, non?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}I expect we have a lot of ground to cover. Let's make sure we're all prepared and press on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Heh, you've still got some fight in you, I see. How encouraging.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}What exactly is that figure? And why does it keep setting Shadows on us?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Just what on earth is its motive...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}I've been mulling that over in my head for a while now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}But I'm happy to leave the thinking to you. You're the brains between the two of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 3 25 25}Don't say that, Akihiko... Putting yourself down like that's a bad habit to develop.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}Nah, I figured my strong suit's more beating things with my fists, so my brain's completely tapped out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}While you were away, I ended up the oldest of the bunch, and I just had a hard time concentrating while looking out for everyone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}Aigis, you heard what Akihiko said... Is that right? He watched out for everyone?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 3 25 25}Ah, perhaps there was a discrepancy in how you both perceived the situation, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4106 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 3 25 25}Well, your silence says it all. I do commend you for trying to do right by both sides, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}At any rate, it's true people have their own strengths and weaknesses. Let's move on. Akihiko, you take point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}You've got a real knack for leading, Aigis. It's made combat easier for all of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_040_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I still have a lot to learn.

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3096 3085 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}You were especially impressive in that last fight. Sure put up a fight against some difficult enemies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3131 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}Striving for improvement, huh? I respect that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}All right, time for me to get in the zone and follow your example.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}What's that supposed to mean?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}I don't mean anything by it. It's just... Well, I haven't given it much thought since a lot's been happening.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}I mean, I'm just more worried about that figure and all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}Right, it ran on us... Would be nice if we could catch it next time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}The moment we see it again, let's drop everything and chase after it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Heh, handin' out brutal beatdowns is a breeze with my battle buddy around![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Ain't that right, Koromaru?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Hey now, what's with the growlin'?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}Aigis, me n' Koromaru make one deadly duo, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}I'm no dog whisperer, but... I can see into his soul, and it's tellin' me those are ruffs of rejection right there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Awww, Ai-chan... And you too, boy? Cold as ice, the both of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2124 0 0}Man... So my affections were just one-sided, after all? S'okay, whatever, that's fine. I'm cool. We're cool.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Hehe. Oh, Koro-chan, you silly boy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Your tail's been wagging this whole time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}Strong enemies are no doubt dangerous, but I love that I get to team up and face them at your side, Sister.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7030 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}I know what you mean. There's nothing quite like fighting alongside other people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}I was really impressed by everyone's teamwork and comradery when I first joined you all in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 0 25 25}Wow, really? Huh, I guess everyone feels the same way, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 11 4 25 25}Oh! But don't get me wrong, Sister—it's EXTRA special when just you and I team up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30027 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 1 25 25}Mhm, of course! I'm glad you understood what I meant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 3 25 25}How am I supposed to react to this...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}Koromaru-san is always fretting over the rest of the team after we take out a stronger opponent.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30057 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 3 25 25}Or perhaps it's more apt to say that he's showing he cares... Hm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 0 25 25}It's as if he considers himself the alpha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30034 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 2 25 25}But you're the real leader here, Sister. Koromaru-san is simply excited from the battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 3 25 25}But he still tries to do all this leader-y stuff... It just doesn't make sense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 2 25 25}Hey, don't you feign ignorance with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30047 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 3 25 25}...I really don't comprehend any of my sister's friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 2 25 25}All right, now we can get back to exploring. Let's hurry to the next door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 3 25 25}We just overcame a difficult battle, Yukari. Are you sure you don't need a moment to reorient yourself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}What say you, Aigis? Shall we push on or return and regroup?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 3 25 25}All right, understood. We'll abide by the leader's decision.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}Yeah, I get it... We all need a breather—to recuperate a bit before continuing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4003 0 0}You ought to be more confident in your decision-making skills. After all, you did get us this far.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Take some time to assess our current situation, then make your call.[n]{f 1 1}
